Intraday post (26/Jan)

Weekly post:

FOMC Week, long zomma/short vomma | Weekly post (26-30/Jan)

I dropped a very important broader macro and micro market report containing institutionals, geo, yen etc-etc.:

Earning season, Micro and Macro flows, Carry trade & Geopolitic landscape | Quant Insights - January 2026

Geo context including “Board of Peace”:

On NDX, keep your eyes on this zone (shared on last week):

Let’s look at the daily positioning…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

The net speed profile is positive everywhere. There is a very little downside short vomma trade from customers’ side, but really little.

Centroid is 6886.85 - 6898.16, vol expectations shift there.

Upside pivot is at 6954.88target is 6963.84 to 70sMarket is expected to stabilize in this area.

Downside pivot is at 6853.13target is 6844.75The downside pivot is a “line-in-the-sand” a local vanna flip, and the probability is very high that spot would reverse from there.

We have pretty much resistances into both ways.To the downside, its 6870/80 area becomes a strong resistance into the PM session, expected to brake the momentum and maybe pin to 6860, but reversion is a bit more likely.

To the upside, 6925/30 are is also a reversion potential, a local “line-in-the-sand”, pinning probably to the upside pivot if spot opens above, or to 6900 if below (with potentially touching 6880).However, this line is a bit easier to break until 2PM, compared to the vanna flip/downside pivot.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
